name: io.github.miller-joe/youtube-mcp
description: OAuth-authenticated YouTube MCP for channel owners — edit videos, manage comments/playlists, query analytics, and set AI-generated thumbnails via a ComfyUI bridge.

environmentVariables.name: YOUTUBE_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Google OAuth 2.0 Client ID (from Google Cloud Console, Desktop app type). See README for setup.

environmentVariables.name: YOUTUBE_CLIENT_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: Google OAuth 2.0 Client Secret. Pair with YOUTUBE_CLIENT_ID.

environmentVariables.name: YOUTUBE_CLIENT_SECRET_FILE
environmentVariables.description: Alternative to CLIENT_ID/CLIENT_SECRET: path to the JSON credentials file downloaded from Google Cloud.

environmentVariables.name: COMFYUI_URL
environmentVariables.description: ComfyUI HTTP URL for the generate_and_set_thumbnail bridge tool. When unset, that tool is disabled.

environmentVariables.name: COMFYUI_DEFAULT_CKPT
environmentVariables.description: Default ComfyUI checkpoint filename for bridge tool (default: sd_xl_base_1.0.safetensors)
